description: Implement CodeContextBench integration for separate Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Copilot, and OpenHands harnesses, with Codex pinned to gpt-5.3-codex and sourcegraph_full-only MCP mode.

userStories.title: Add shared multi-harness contract document
userStories.description: As a benchmark maintainer, I want one explicit contract that every separate harness must satisfy so run scripts and reporting remain consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: File docs/HARNESS_CONTRACT.md exists
docs/HARNESS_CONTRACT.md defines required fields: harness_name, agent_import_path, model_default, transcript_artifact_path, result metadata requirements
docs/HARNESS_CONTRACT.md defines allowed MCP modes for this rollout as none and sourcegraph_full
docs/HARNESS_CONTRACT.md includes a conformance checklist section for Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Copilot, and OpenHands
rg -n 'sourcegraph_full|transcript|agent_import_path|Codex|Cursor|Gemini|Copilot|OpenHands' docs/HARNESS_CONTRACT.md returns at least 8 matches

userStories.title: Add harness registry config for all five harnesses
userStories.description: As an operator, I want one machine-readable registry mapping harnesses to default import paths and model policies.
acceptanceCriteria: File configs/harness_registry.json exists and is valid JSON
configs/harness_registry.json contains entries for codex, cursor, gemini, copilot, openhands
codex entry default_model is gpt-5.3-codex
all entries include allowed_mcp_modes and contain exactly none and sourcegraph_full for this rollout
python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('configs/harness_registry.json')); print(sorted(d.keys()))" includes all five harness keys

userStories.title: Create codex_2config runner
userStories.description: As an operator, I want a first-class Codex 2-config runner script matching existing run hygiene patterns.
acceptanceCriteria: File configs/codex_2config.sh exists and is executable
Script sources configs/_common.sh
Script supports flags: --model, --agent-path, --parallel, --baseline-only, --full-only
Script runs Harbor with BASELINE_MCP_TYPE set to none or sourcegraph_full only
bash -n configs/codex_2config.sh passes

userStories.title: Create cursor_2config and gemini_2config runners
userStories.description: As an operator, I want dedicated Cursor and Gemini runners so each harness can be launched without ad hoc script edits.
acceptanceCriteria: Files configs/cursor_2config.sh and configs/gemini_2config.sh exist and are executable
Each script sources configs/_common.sh
Each script supports flags: --model, --agent-path, --parallel, --baseline-only, --full-only
Each script constrains MCP modes to none and sourcegraph_full
bash -n configs/cursor_2config.sh passes
bash -n configs/gemini_2config.sh passes

userStories.title: Create copilot_2config and openhands_2config runners
userStories.description: As an operator, I want dedicated Copilot and OpenHands runners with the same paired-run semantics.
acceptanceCriteria: Files configs/copilot_2config.sh and configs/openhands_2config.sh exist and are executable
Each script sources configs/_common.sh
Each script supports flags: --model, --agent-path, --parallel, --baseline-only, --full-only
Each script constrains MCP modes to none and sourcegraph_full
bash -n configs/copilot_2config.sh passes
bash -n configs/openhands_2config.sh passes

userStories.title: Generalize compare scaffold for five-harness execution
userStories.description: As an analyst, I want a multi-harness comparison scaffold that can launch all five harnesses on a matched task set.
acceptanceCriteria: File configs/multi_harness_compare.sh exists and is executable
Script supports selecting harness subset via --harnesses flag
Script supports benchmark/task filtering with existing selected tasks file
Script prints deterministic jobs directory naming that includes harness and config labels
bash -n configs/multi_harness_compare.sh passes

userStories.title: Add transcript discovery abstraction for non-Claude artifacts
userStories.description: As a report maintainer, I want transcript discovery to support multiple harness artifact names, not only claude-code.txt.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/ccb_metrics/discovery.py includes helper logic to resolve transcript path from multiple candidate filenames
scripts/ccb_metrics/judge_context.py uses shared transcript resolver instead of hardcoded claude-code.txt path
scripts/ccb_metrics/extractors.py supports missing claude-code.txt by trying harness-appropriate alternatives
python3 -m py_compile scripts/ccb_metrics/discovery.py scripts/ccb_metrics/judge_context.py scripts/ccb_metrics/extractors.py succeeds

userStories.title: Add gpt-5.3-codex pricing support and unknown-model guard
userStories.description: As a cost analyst, I want explicit Codex model pricing mapping and deterministic behavior for unknown model identifiers.
acceptanceCriteria: scripts/ccb_metrics/extractors.py MODEL_PRICING includes gpt-5.3-codex entry
Cost extraction path logs or documents fallback behavior for unknown models
python3 -m py_compile scripts/ccb_metrics/extractors.py succeeds
docs/WORKFLOW_METRICS.md or docs/CONFIGS.md mentions model pricing caveat for non-Anthropic harnesses

userStories.title: Document Codex auth policy and fail-fast model availability
userStories.description: As an operator, I want explicit docs that Codex auth is separate from Claude OAuth refresh flow and official runs fail fast if gpt-5.3-codex is unavailable.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/CONFIGS.md or a new docs/CODEX_HARNESS.md documents Codex auth modes (ChatGPT login and API key) and states Claude token refresh automation is not reused
Documentation states official Codex runs require gpt-5.3-codex and fail fast if unavailable
Documentation states sourcegraph_full-only MCP policy for this rollout
rg -n 'gpt-5.3-codex|fail-fast|ChatGPT login|API key|sourcegraph_full' docs returns matches in the new/updated doc

userStories.title: Add preflight harness readiness script
userStories.description: As an operator, I want a preflight checker that validates declared harness registry entries and required environment variables before running batches.
acceptanceCriteria: File scripts/check_harness_readiness.py exists
Script validates configs/harness_registry.json structure and required keys
Script supports --harness flag to validate one harness or all
Script returns non-zero exit code on missing required fields/env vars
python3 scripts/check_harness_readiness.py --help runs successfully
